textByHashes.3c6ebd491b8772fbe67649118a7433ec952679cb: So, you want to be on the Nice List huh?
textByHashes.96d66fcc6c54c805960d647beb11d8b03b035dca: So let me tell you about the first game.
textByHashes.d46806dd21cafce7b023d42c5497b3514c978c7c: There are other non-player ch... I mean competitors in here, who will also be trying to offload their coal.
textByHashes.2c7c843aaca7b9bec4b3550f308919d5c8ab3f84: Simply pick up the coal and hand it out to your opponents to eliminate them.
textByHashes.2a9cba4da6f7802245a4a9e006ec85a4d53dec72: The large piles contain 40 pieces of coal. The small piles contain 20 pieces of coal.
textByHashes.9516e2042166356c46bba34b6df3361baf1310c4: Be careful not to carry too much or you might get caught out and eliminated.
textByHashes.b162fb1bc8bcabb184759297f003ef8d50ff83b6: Are you ready to start the first game?
textByHashes.50ac1f201a5d3bbd89eb4bf04e7c76d92276c95b: Congrats on winning the game! You've done a smashing job!
textByHashes.4ffa081fa393a8a4fd86288d51c3c12a139ec735: Come and speak to me when you're ready to advance to the next game.
textByHashes.b17a71a4ba2f5f9923be420912e6cba85db37585: Their body is round, with a carrot for a nose. They love to be cold, from their head to their toes.
textByHashes.c8728a24c6bf5d1d9ae37fd1b44e938235fec4c2: That's not quite right, I'm afraid.
textByHashes.58ac1aebf487b475fd36e61d0a25b47d6648c553: Brilliant! On to the next challenge!
textByHashes.d9dab95d1726879e9305c566435981389b56f015: It's jolly good fun. Part of me wishes I could join in.
textByHashes.ce0ab45ff4b5018f780000eee5bfbe11bc70a34b: A free pass onto the Nice List!
textByHashes.8fec4d283ed7f640cf9bae68ef8cb5822784ac0b: Plus I'm very judgemental so the job is quite fitting.
textByHashes.b832bd196c7e0cfeff6dfe426d6970a56ac6f022: Well, before all this I was a Judge in a very prestigious court.
textByHashes.a3540068e69ca53b8a685dc33c2442b8ad708d1e: I loved all the opportunities to help people in Gielinor.
textByHashes.ede2f3c2428cc3e529ba7a25abb9c518bc5fa52c: Alas, that was a long time ago. I've since passed away.
textByHashes.2d3a3312129508b4153ae2b3afbda007c45081c5: Oh we all are here! Santa gave us the opportunity to stay here in this sanctuary.
textByHashes.f6ebffb1857b86a8e332ac640d946cfa26708f81: That's just the thing, while we are in here we can keep our mortal body with Santa's magic.
textByHashes.19089d1732e08087c63d0b9237b323c986d0afb7: Where did you think the ghosts of Christmas past, present and future go?
textByHashes.e6d756e501d18fd2ca6dfd07040a08a5747b30bf: Looks like you are on the...
